metadata.notes: FSK is managed by FS/KKR Advisor (joint venture of FS Investments and KKR). Large ABF/structured finance book with many KKR-managed vehicles. Portfolio includes significant overlap with OBDC (Dental Care Alliance, Insight Global, Foundation Risk Partners, Integrity Marketing, Higginbotham, MB2 Dental, VetCor) and BXSL (Zendesk, Medallia, Gigamon, Granicus, Cambrex, Circana, Netsmart, NAVEX).
